title: From Discipline to Distance: The Journey of Keuly Yemele
preview: Keuly Yemele is a distance runner who combines discipline, consistency, and a long-term vision to improve every season — all while balancing a full-time career in technology.
content: Keuly Yemele is a distance runner who combines discipline, consistency, and a long-term vision to improve every season.

Balancing a full-time career in technology with high-level training, he has built a routine centered on steady mileage, structured workouts, and smart recovery. His approach is simple: stay consistent, listen to the body, and execute when it matters.

Over time, this mindset has translated into strong performances across multiple distances. He currently holds a personal best of 2:52 in the marathon, reflecting his commitment to long-term progression and disciplined training.
Rather than chasing quick results, Keuly focuses on building fitness step by step, aiming for continuous improvement and higher-level competition.
His journey reflects what LionStride stands for: identifying potential, putting in the work, and creating opportunities through performance.

title: Geoffrey Kirwa Opens LionStride's 2026 International Campaign with Victory in Cameroon
summary: Geoffrey Kipchirchir Kirwa claimed victory at the 2026 Édéa International Half Marathon in Cameroon, opening LionStride Management's summer racing campaign with an impressive international win.
content: LionStride Management is proud to celebrate another milestone as Geoffrey Kipchirchir Kirwa claimed victory at the 2026 Édéa International Half Marathon in Cameroon.
Competing against a strong international field, Geoffrey crossed the finish line first in 1:09:15, earning LionStride Management's first international victory of the 2026 season.
Attention now turns to the Madiba International Half Marathon on July 12, where Geoffrey will race alongside LionStride teammates Alfred Kimani and Sharon Jemaiyo Kipchumba.
Following Madiba, all three athletes are scheduled to compete at the N'Djamena International Half Marathon in Chad on July 26 as LionStride continues expanding its international presence.
